CVE-2024-6239.title: A flaw was found in the Poppler's Pdfinfo utility. This issue occ ...
CVE-2024-6239.description: A flaw was found in the Poppler's Pdfinfo utility. This issue occurs when using -dests parameter with pdfinfo utility. By using certain malformed input files, an attacker could cause the utility to crash, leading to a denial of service.

CVE-2025-32365.title: Poppler before 25.04.0 allows crafted input files to trigger out- ...
CVE-2025-32365.description: Poppler before 25.04.0 allows crafted input files to trigger out-of-bounds reads in the JBIG2Bitmap::combine function in JBIG2Stream.cc because of a misplaced isOk check.

CVE-2025-32365.description: Poppler before 25.04.0 allows crafted input files to trigger out-of-bounds reads in the JBIG2Bitmap::combine function in JBIG2Stream.cc because of a misplaced isOk check.
